blocks.text: Match preview: Surrey Women face The Blaze Women in Semi Final 1 (T20) on Fri, 17 Jul, 2026, 3:30 pm at Kennington Oval London. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.

blocks.text: Seam-friendly English conditions; overcast skies assist swing bowlers.
